content.body:
Handles package.json, go.mod (direct deps only), requirements.txt,
Cargo.toml, and pyproject.toml. Each direct dependency produces an
EXTRACTED fact draft tagged [dependency, <language>, bootstrap].

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cartographer): add DependencyManifestExtractor with tests
